name: NBC Sports Next for Golf
description: GolfNow plays a crucial role in the booming golf industry by providing online tee times and marketing solutions that help golf courses attract and retain players. Their G1 platform, backed by NBC Sports, offers comprehensive management tools designed for course operators, enhancing the overall golfing experience.

name: Worldwide Golf Shops
description: Worldwide Golf Shops is a prominent specialty golf retailer, offering a wide range of golf products and services, including club fitting and repair. With over 85 stores and a strong online presence, they provide an extensive selection of major brands, ensuring golfers have access to quality equipment and apparel.

name: American Golf
description: American Golf is Europe's largest golf retailer, offering a wide selection of golf equipment for all skill levels, including clubs, balls, shoes, and clothing. With a commitment to value and customer satisfaction, they provide exclusive deals and expert staff to enhance the shopping experience.

name: Supreme Golf
description: Supreme Golf is a service provider that connects golfers with a vast inventory of over 16 million tee times at more than 12,000 golf courses worldwide. They offer advanced course management solutions and tools designed to enhance the golfing experience and maximize revenue for golf courses.

name: aboutGolf Limited
description: aboutGOLF is dedicated to making golf more accessible for players of all skill levels and income brackets through their innovative simulators and technology. With 20 years of experience, they provide a top-notch simulated golf experience, ideal for both seasoned veterans and newcomers to the sport.

name: IMG Golf Course Services
description: IMG is a global leader in the design and management of world-class golf courses, having developed over 100 courses worldwide. The company also offers comprehensive golf club management services and operates a network of over 150 premier golf courses, enhancing the golfing experience through its expertise and resources.

name: The Golfing Hub
description: The Golfing Hub is dedicated to delivering exceptional customer service, emphasizing a personalized approach rather than a corporate atmosphere.

name: Callaway Golf
description: Callaway Golf is a prominent manufacturer of high-quality golf equipment, offering a diverse range of products including clubs, balls, and gear designed to enhance performance.

name: Maps4Golf a division of A4Golf Group
description: Maps4Golf, a division of A4Golf Group, specializes in CAD modeling and 3D graphics for golf courses, offering innovative GPS Golf Course Database solutions and digital tools that enhance the golfing experience. Their expertise and technology enable companies and golfers to navigate the complexities of digital transformation in the golf industry.

name: The Golf Den
description: The Golf Den is a premier destination for golf enthusiasts, offering virtual golf experiences with advanced PGA TOUR simulators and 3Trak ball-tracking technology. It also provides golf instruction, club services, and a year-round indoor golfing environment in the Greater Edmonton Area.
